WITN09390100
WITN09390100

71. Given that the issue of Horizon was never raised to me, I do not feel that I can comment as to whether I consider sufficient information regarding bugs, errors and defects in Horizon was passed to the Post Office by Fujitsu.

72. I can only comment on my own cases and only feel able to repeat that the issue of Horizon was never brought up. Had it arisen, I would have investigated it further.

73. There are no other matters that I wish to bring to the attention of the Chair of the Inquiry.

Statement of Truth
I believe the content of this statement to be true.

Signed: GRO

Dated: 16.10.2023

- 23 -
